backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Punjabi Bites backend, managing menu items (CRUD, availability toggle) and UPI payment settings with admin-only access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a revert from Version 28 to Version 27, specifically targeting changes in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx related to a UPI deep link fix.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, page, hook, and context in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Punjabi Bites – Authentic Punjabi Cuisine' and mounting the React app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with three routes (/, /admin, /payment), wraps the app in CartProvider, QueryClientProvider, ErrorBoundary, and Toaster, and renders a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI shown to unauthenticated or non-admin users, offering login via Internet Identity and a back-to-menu navigation button.
frontend/src/components/CartSidebar.tsx: Sliding cart sidebar that shows cart items with quantity controls, navigates to /payment on desktop, and shows a UPI payment modal on mobile; confirms payment by clearing the cart and navigating to /.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based ErrorBoundary that catches rendering errors and displays a branded fallback UI with a reload button.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Punjabi Bites brand, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking parameters.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, login/logout via Internet Identity, and an admin panel button shown conditionally based on the user's admin status.
frontend/src/components/icons/PaymentApp: SVG icon components for GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm with configurable size and className props.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple page layout wrapper that composes Header, a main content area, and Footer around child components.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemCard.tsx: Card component displaying a menu item's image, name, price, category badge, and add/remove-from-cart quantity controls.
frontend/src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx: React Hook Form-based form for creating or editing a menu item, with fields for name, description, price, category, and image URL.
frontend/src/components/PresetImagePicke: Intentionally empty placeholder component not used in Version 2.
frontend/src/components/UpiPaymentButton: Renders GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm buttons that each build a UPI deep-link and redirect the user to the selected payment app.
frontend/src/components/UpiPaymentOption: Modal dialog presenting GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm UPI payment options plus a confirmation button to finalize the order after payment.
frontend/src/contexts/CartContext.tsx: React context providing cart state (items, totals) and actions (add, remove, update quantity, clear) for the entire app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an anonymous or authenticated actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including menu item CRUD, availability toggling, admin checks, and UPI settings management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm Punjabi Bites color palette in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing menu items (add, edit, delete, toggle availability) and UPI payment settings, with access control guarding the UI.
frontend/src/pages/MenuDisplay.tsx: Public-facing menu page that fetches and displays menu items grouped by category with a hero banner, loading/error states, and a cart sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: React page component that displays an order summary and UPI payment options, fetching UPI settings via a query hook and handling payment confirmation by clearing the cart and navigating home.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove sensitive parameters from the URL hash without reloading.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom brand color palette (saffron, deepRed, cream, spice), typography fonts, border radius tokens, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file recording version 3 of the project, which tracks a single existing feature to revert the project from Version 28 back to Version 27.
